'''kavanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycosterol|mycosterol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycosterol|mycosterol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kavanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kævængæth|kævængæth]] || [[word:kævængæj|kævængæj]] || [[word:kævængæsh|kævængæsh]] || [[word:kævængæ|kævængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kavavangath|kavavangath]] || [[word:kavavangaj|kavavangaj]] || [[word:kavavangash|kavavangash]] || [[word:kavavanga|kavavanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kavangath|kavangath]] || [[word:kavangaj|kavangaj]] || [[word:kavangash|kavangash]] || [[word:kavanga|kavanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kavafngath|kavafngath]] || [[word:kavafngaj|kavafngaj]] || [[word:kavafngash|kavafngash]] || [[word:kavafngaf|kavafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kavangatha|kavangatha]] || [[word:kavangaja|kavangaja]] || [[word:kavangasha|kavangasha]] || [[word:kavangaka|kavangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kavangath|kavangath]] || [[word:kavangaj|kavangaj]] || [[word:kavangash|kavangash]] || [[word:kavanga|kavanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kavangathal|kavangathal]] || [[word:kavangajal|kavangajal]] || [[word:kavangashal|kavangashal]] || [[word:kavangakal|kavangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kavangathatha|kavangathatha]] || [[word:kavangajaja|kavangajaja]] || [[word:kavangashasha|kavangashasha]] || [[word:kavangaka|kavangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kavangathan|kavangathan]] || [[word:kavangajan|kavangajan]] || [[word:kavangashan|kavangashan]] || [[word:kavangakan|kavangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kavangathaoro|kavangathaoro]] || [[word:kavangajaoro|kavangajaoro]] || [[word:kavangashaoro|kavangashaoro]] || [[word:kavangakaoro|kavangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
